title: Netflix Snaps Up Cannes Critics Week’s Animated Feature ‘In Waves’ (EXCLUSIVE)
content:
The deal was negotiated by Anonymous Content, CAA Media Finance and Charades

In Netflix’s first major deal out of the 2026Cannes Film Festival, the streamer has picked up global rights outside of France to breakout Critics Week opener “In Waves,” an adaptation of AJ Dungo’s 2019 graphic memoir.

The animated romance directed by Phuong Mai Nguyen boasts a voice cast led by Oscar-nominated Stephanie Hsu and BAFTA winner Will Sharpe.

The movie, which opened Critics’ Week to rave reviews, has quickly emerged as one of the breakout titles of Cannes’ parallel sections. In its review,Varietydescribed the film as “an elegantly animated adaptation,’” praising the emotional depth of Nguyen’s coming-of-age love story.

Netflix won the buzzy project in a highly competitive bidding war, after multiple worldwide offers. The deal, which is rumored to be in the mid-seven figure range, was negotiated by Anonymous Content, CAA Media Finance and Charades on behalf of the filmmakers.

Produced by Silex Films, distributed in France by Diaphana and sold internationally by Charades, “In Waves” is directed by Phuong Mai Nguyen and written by Fanny Burdino and Samuel Doux, based on the acclaimed graphic novel by Dungo.

Set in Los Angeles, the film follows AJ, a shy teenager who loves skateboarding and drawing, and Kristen, a passionate surfer. The pair fall deeply in love and envision a future together until Kristen is struck by a sudden illness. Together, they navigate adversity through the strength of their relationship, the support of their friends and a shared connection to surfing and the ocean.

The film is produced by Priscilla Bertin and Judith Nora. Executive producers include David Levine, Yohann Comte, Carole Baraton, Pierre Mazars, Sharpe, Hsu, Nick Shumaker and David Levine on behalf of Anonymous Content.

“From the very start, we were energized by Mai’s unmistakable talent and the ability of AJ’s story to deeply move audiences,” said David Levine and Nick Shumaker of Anonymous Content. “This exciting partnership with Netflix will ensure that our romantic, coming-of-age story reaches people all over the world.”

Priscilla Bertin of Silex Films said: “I am very happy about this partnership with Netflix and their enthusiasm for ‘In Waves,’ which gives us the opportunity to reach the broadest possible audience and share this deeply moving true love story with the world.”

— Zack Sharf contributed to this report.
title_zh: Netflix 獲得了坎城影展評論家週的動畫電影《浪潮(In Waves)》的獨家發行權。
content_zh:
這筆交易是由匿名內容(Anonymous Content)、CAA媒體財務(CAA Media Finance)和Charades協商的。

在2026年坎城電影節上，Netflix達成了首個重大交易，獲得了突破性影評人週開幕片《浪潮(In Waves)》的全球版權（法國除外），該片改編自AJ Dungo於2019年的圖畫回憶錄。

這部由阮芳梅(Phuong Mai Nguyen)執導的動畫浪漫片，聲音演出陣容由奧斯卡提名的許瑟芬(Stephanie Hsu)和BAFTA獲獎者威爾·夏普(Will Sharpe)領銜。

該片在影評人週首映後獲得了熱烈的好評，迅速成為坎城平行單元中的突破性作品之一。在其評價中，《綜藝(Variety)》形容這部電影為「一部優雅的動畫改編」，讚揚了阮芳梅的成長愛情故事的情感深度。

Netflix在一場激烈的競標戰中贏得了這個備受關注的項目，並接獲多個全球性的報價。這筆交易據傳價位在中七位數範圍內，由匿名內容、CAA媒體財務和Charades代表製片人進行協商。

《浪潮(In Waves)》由Silex Films製作，法國由Diaphana發行，並由Charades負責國際銷售，該片由阮芳梅執導，劇本由法妮·布爾迪諾(Fanny Burdino)和薩繆爾·杜克(Samuel Doux)撰寫，基於Dungo的著名圖畫小說。

影片設定在洛杉磯，講述了一位喜愛滑板和繪畫的害羞少年AJ和一位熱情的衝浪者Kristen之間的故事。這對情侶深深相愛，並憧憬著共同的未來，直到Kristen突遭重病。兩人一起在逆境中堅持，依靠彼此的關係、朋友的支持以及對衝浪和海洋的共同連結。

該片的製作人包括普莉西拉·貝爾廷(Priscilla Bertin)和朱迪思·諾拉(Judith Nora)。執行製作人包括大衛·萊文(David Levine)、約翰·孔特(Yohann Comte)、卡羅爾·巴拉頓(Carole Baraton)、皮埃爾·馬扎(Pierre Mazars)、夏普、許瑟芬、尼克·舒梅克(Nick Shumaker)和大衛·萊文，皆代表匿名內容。

匿名內容的大衛·萊文和尼克·舒梅克表示：「從一開始，我們就被Mai的非凡才華和AJ故事深深打動觀眾的能力所激勵。這次與Netflix的激動人心的合作將確保我們的浪漫成長故事能夠傳達到全世界的人們。」

Silex Films的普莉西拉·貝爾廷表示：「我對這次與Netflix的合作感到非常高興，他們對《浪潮(In Waves)》的熱情讓我們有機會接觸到最廣泛的觀眾，並與世界分享這個深具感動的真愛故事。」

— 扎克·夏夫(Zack Sharf)為本報導做出了貢獻。
summary_zh:
這筆交易是由匿名內容(Anonymous Content)、CAA媒體財務(CAA Media Finance)和Charades協商的。

在2026年坎城電影節上，Netflix達成了首個重大交易，獲得了突破性影評人週開幕片《浪潮(In Waves)》的全球版權（法國除外），該片改編自AJ Dungo於2019年的圖畫回憶錄。
